name: Read-only L0 discovery advisor
summary: Builds advisory-only L0 discovery suggestions from explicit read-only diagnostic records without mutating context selection, provider prompts, indexes, embeddings, memory stores, or repository state.
limits: Advisory diagnostic output only; no automatic include_l0 behavior.
selection_effect remains none for the advisor record and every suggestion.
Does not mutate ContextPackManifest.items or any context-selection result.
Does not change provider prompts or prompt rendering.
Does not perform live retrieval against production indexes.
Does not call external embedding APIs or create production embeddings.
Does not mutate vector indexes, document indexes, memory stores, or repository state.
Does not perform token-budget enforcement or emit token-budget telemetry.
Does not admit non-none reranking or adapter behavior.
risks: Diagnostic retrieval_score may be misread as selection authority unless selection_effect none and guardrails remain explicit.
Future live retrieval, production embeddings, reranking, or adapter integration must not be inferred from this diagnostic slice.
recommended_next_actions: Keep any future automatic inclusion adapter, prompt change, token-budget enforcement, production retrieval, production embedding, non-none reranking, or index/store mutation behind a separate PLAN/WARRANT.
Use advisory output as diagnostic evidence only; do not treat suggested include_l0 arguments as automatic context-selection decisions.
